title: Release Plan
scenario: Create a release plan for a software product. The plan should include release schedule, features to be included, and testing plan. The plan should be generated in a JSON format and should be no more than 10KB in size.
constraints: Must be no more than 10KB in size
Must include features to be included

evaluationCriteria.description: The plan adheres to the constraints (size, schedule, features)
The JSON syntax is correct and follows standard guidelines
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
